title: Typed Bucket Endpoint and S3 Express Compatibility · Type Forensics
summary: A Node incident packet contains a plausible bucket and endpoint compatibility matrix with one unsafe assertion, stale object identity, unbounded stream, lost rejection, abort leak, cache defect, policy gap, or recovery overclaim; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bucket and endpoint compatibility matrix and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-ca…
objectives: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, compare general-purpose and directory buckets by namespace, endpoint, zone, ordering, throughput, durability scope, versioning, lifecycle, and feature support.
In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, construct regional virtual-hosted and zonal endpoints without confusing region, availability zone, bucket name, TLS name, or path style.
In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, resolve intended region and endpoint explicitly and reject redirects, signing-region drift, and accidental cross-region transfer.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug General Directory Bucket
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 1281 during a regional recovery and budget exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to narrow bucket type before validating directory-bucket endpoint and session state; do not treat TypeScript types, a resolved promise, CORS, ETag, or an emulator as stronger proof than it is; then change object version, signed header, or cache dimension and reject stale authority. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, compare general-purpose and directory buckets by namespace, endpoint, zone, ordering, throughput, durability scope, versioning, lifecycle, and feature support.

Inspect the General Directory Bucket trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
